title: Lessingianthus laevigatus
taxonomy: Lessingianthus laevigatus is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is classified within the genus Lessingianthus, which is a group of plants native to Brazil. The plant is further classified as a member of the tribe Vernonieae, a large group of flowering plants known for their daisy-like flowers. The classification of Lessingianthus laevigatus reflects its evolutionary relationships with other plants in the Asteraceae family. The specific classification provides a framework for understanding the plant's characteristics and behaviors.
